summary: This is a brief announcement post directing readers to O'Neil's Bloomberg View column about the Harvard admissions controversy. The post itself contains no substantive argument, only linking to the external essay with the provocative claim that college admissions will never be fair, but suggests we can build a better system if we acknowledge this reality.
key_points: O'Neil wrote a Bloomberg View essay about the Harvard admissions controversy
Her thesis is that elite college admissions will never be truly fair
She suggests recognizing this unfairness could help us build better systems
money_quotes: College Admissions Will Never Be Fair
If we recognize this, we can build a better system
key_insight: Acknowledging the inherent unfairness of elite college admissions is a prerequisite for improving the system.
